UpdateSourceArgs: -c "base='{{$FullBaseDir}}'; win64=\"$base/R5/Binaries/Win64\"; rm -f \"$win64/dwmapi.dll\"; rm -rf \"$win64/ue4ss/Mods/WindrosePlus\"; if [ -f \"$win64/ue4ss/Mods/mods.txt\" ]; then sed -i '/^[[:space:]]*WindrosePlus[[:space:]]*:/Id' \"$win64/ue4ss/Mods/mods.txt\"; fi"

-c "set -euo pipefail; base='{{$FullBaseDir}}'; win64=\"$base/R5/Binaries/Win64\"; mods=\"$win64/ue4ss/Mods\"; src=\"$base/.windroseplus_staging\"; test -d \"$src/WindrosePlus\"; mkdir -p \"$mods\" \"$base/windrose_plus_data/logs\" \"$base/windrose_plus_data/rcon\" \"$base/windrose_plus/config\"; cp -f \"$src/UE4SS-settings.ini\" \"$win64/ue4ss/UE4SS-settings.ini\" 2>/dev/null || true; mkdir -p \"$mods/WindrosePlus\"; rm -rf \"$mods/WindrosePlus/Scripts\"; cp -a \"$src/WindrosePlus/.\" \"$mods/WindrosePlus/\"; mkdir -p \"$base/windrose_plus\"; rm -rf \"$base/windrose_plus/server\" \"$base/windrose_plus/tools\" \"$base/windrose_plus/docs\"; cp -a \"$src/server\" \"$src/tools\" \"$src/docs\" \"$base/windrose_plus/\"; cp -f \"$src/config/\"*.default.ini \"$base/windrose_plus/config/\" 2>/dev/null || true; touch \"$mods/mods.txt\"; grep -qiE '^[[:space:]]*WindrosePlus[[:space:]]*:' \"$mods/mods.txt\" || printf '\\nWindrosePlus : 1\\n' >> \"$mods/mods.txt\"; if [ -f \"$mods/mods.json\" ] && command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then tmp=$(mktemp); jq 'if any(.[]?; .mod_name==\"WindrosePlus\") then . else . + [{\"mod_name\":\"WindrosePlus\",\"mod_enabled\":true}] end' \"$mods/mods.json\" > \"$tmp\" && mv \"$tmp\" \"$mods/mods.json\"; fi; if [ ! -f \"$base/windrose_plus.json\" ]; then pass=$(openssl rand -hex 16 2>/dev/null || tr -d '-' < /proc/sys/kernel/random/uuid); printf '{\\n  \"server\": { \"http_port\": 8780, \"bind_ip\": \"127.0.0.1\" },\\n  \"rcon\": { \"enabled\": true, \"port\": 27320, \"password\": \"%s\" },\\n  \"query\": { \"enabled\": true },\\n  \"livemap\": { \"enabled\": false },\\n  \"poiscan\": { \"enabled\": false },\\n  \"multipliers\": {},\\n  \"admin\": { \"steam_ids\": [] },\\n  \"features\": {},\\n  \"debug\": { \"log_level\": \"info\" }\\n}\\n' \"$pass\" > \"$base/windrose_plus.json\"; fi; rm -rf \"$src\"; echo 'Windrose+ installed or refreshed'"
